## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / refactor / tooling (no user-facing change)

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm test` passes (`vitest run`)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test (new test file, or an existing
      enum/allowlist extended — see CLAUDE.md test rules)

Describe how you verified the change (commands run, output observed):

```
paste verification here
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Docs updated if commands/options changed (`docs/commands/*`, guide.html)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or absolute personal paths committed

## Linked issues

Closes #
